nasb.text: It was he who took shrewd advantage of our race and mistreated our fathers so that they would expose their infants and they would not survive.

esv.text: He dealt shrewdly with our race and forced our fathers to expose their infants, so that they would not be kept alive.

cnv.text: 他就謀害我們的同胞，虐待我們的祖先，逼他們拋棄自己的嬰孩，不容嬰孩存活。

ccb.text: 他用毒计苦害我们的同胞，虐待我们的祖先，强令他们把婴孩抛弃，不让婴孩存活。

csbs.text: 这王狡猾地对待我们的同胞，虐待我们的祖先，强迫他们丢弃自己的婴孩，好使婴孩活不下去。
